name: When is it worth paying for professional knowledge graph and entity file generation?

mainEntity.name: When is it worth paying for professional knowledge graph and entity file generation?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your use case depends on accurate entity matching, explainability, or downstream AI quality, professional help is worth it. The value is highest when the graph needs to support multiple teams, frequent updates, or complex entity relationships.
acceptedAnswer.description: It is worth paying when accuracy, scale, and ongoing maintenance matter.

description: It is worth paying when accuracy, scale, and ongoing maintenance matter.
